candidates.target: Reduce OpenMP barrier time by improving load balance via scheduling controls
candidates.rationale: Profiling shows high omp_barrier_pct and imbalance; controlling work distribution (guided/dynamic chunking) reduces tail effects and synchronization waiting without changing algorithm
candidates.action_sketch: Set an explicit OpenMP schedule to mitigate periodic heavy iterations: try #pragma omp parallel for reduction(+:sum) schedule(guided,chunk) or schedule(dynamic,chunk); optionally pin threads and disable dynamic team resizing to stabilize behavior
preconditions: OpenMP build/run supports changing schedule via pragma or OMP_SCHEDULE
Loop iterations are independent aside from reduction (true here)
correctness_checks: Verify CHECKSUM matches baseline for fixed n and skew across all schedule/thread settings
Run with OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 and compare CHECKSUM to parallel runs
rollback_criteria: If CHECKSUM changes for any tested configuration
If wall_time does not improve or omp_barrier_pct increases relative to baseline schedule(runtime)
